name: media-control-mcp
description: MCP server for controlling Windows media playback via the GlobalSystemMediaTransportControls API. Exposes tools to inspect and control any media session (music players, browsers, video apps, etc.) on Windows.

tools.name: GetCurrentSession
tools.description: Gets the current session. The current session is defined as the session that is currently playing, or if no session is playing, the most recently active session.

tools.name: TogglePlayPause
tools.description: Sends a play or pause command to the current session. The current session is defined as the session that is currently playing, or if no session is playing, the most recently active session.

tools.name: SkipPrevious
tools.description: Sends a skip to previous command to the current session.

tools.name: SkipNext
tools.description: Sends a skip to next command to the current session.

tools.name: Rewind
tools.description: Sends a rewind command to the current session.

tools.name: FastForward
tools.description: Sends a fast forward command to the current session.

tools.name: Echo
tools.description: Echoes the message back to the client.
